zh.Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux,21564,Côte-d'O: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧
zh.Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法國阿奎泰道多艾可德武易爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bourgogne於1229年之後出生時，她的父親Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne8786歲，母親Yolande de Dreux8787歲。她於1239年與Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1263年8月27日在法國阿奎泰道多艾可德武易爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bourgogne于1229年之后出生时，她的父亲Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne8786岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux8787岁。她于1239年与Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1263年8月27日在法国阿奎泰道多艾可德武易爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bourgogne was born after 1229, her father, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, was 8786 and her mother, Yolande de Dreux, was 8787. She married Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean in 1239. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 27 August 1263, in Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bourgogne est née après 1229, son père, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, avait 8786 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux, avait 8787 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean en 1239. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 août 1263, à Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bourgogne nach 1229 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne 8786 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Dreux 8787. Sie hat 1239 Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 27. August 1263 in Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourgogne è nata il dopo il 1229, sua padre, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, aveva 8786 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Dreux, aveva 8787 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean nel 1239. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 agosto 1263, nel Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourgogneが1229年以後に生まれた時，父Hugues IV duc de Bourgogneは8786歳，母Yolande de Dreuxは8787歳であった。1239年にGuillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jeanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1263年8月27日にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンエクスシデウイルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bourgogne(이)가 1229년 이후에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne(은)는 8786세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux(은)는 8787세였다. 그녀는 1239년 Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 8월 27일 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 스시데우일에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bourgogne nasceu após 1229, seu pai, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tinha 8786 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux, tinha 8787 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean em 1239. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1263, em Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bourgogne родилась после 1229 г., её отцу по имени Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne было 8786 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux, 8787. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean в 1239 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 27 августа 1263 г. в местности экссидеуил, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bourgogne nació después de 1229, su papá, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tenía 8786 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux, tenía 8787 años. Se casó con Guillaume III Sire de Mont-Saint-Jean en 1239. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1263, en Excideuil, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia.
